data.body: EPIC a88f COMPLETE — all 12 stories closed, epic closed. WS-F2 finished (variant overlays + cycle guard + JSON schema + front-matter parity + workflow prompt-ref schema-satisfaction). WS-G finished (eval.py: Inspect AI seam behind [eval], grader discipline, at_least(k) gate, coverage, Cohen's-kappa judge alignment, JUnit; rebar prompt eval CLI; eval.yml CI; code-quality.eval.yaml example). Install docs (README) updated: runtime(prod: base=pyyaml + [mcp]/[agents]/[eval]/[tracing]) vs rebar-development([dev]). Final: 381 epic + 197 core-regression tests green; working tree clean; ~36 commits.
